typography.instructions: Avoid Inter/Roboto completely. Use Outfit for high-impact geometric headings. Use JetBrains Mono for the tech architecture stats, timestamps, and deepfake block logs. Keep body text in Manrope for premium legibility.

spacing_and_layout.general: Generous spacing. Use p-8 to p-12 for glassmorphic cards. Massive vertical rhythm between sections (py-24 to py-32).
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento Grid protocol for the Tech Dashboard. Asymmetrical grid for the Product Action tabs.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align text in cards for clinical precision. Center-align hero for cinematic impact.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use backdrop-blur-xl or 2xl. Combine with bg-[#0B0F19]/60 and an inset border of border-white/10. NEVER use pure transparent backgrounds if content scrolls behind it.
visual_enhancers.glow_effects: Use drop-shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,255,135,0.5)] on the primary CTA and critical security alerts. Use subtle cyan blurs behind 3D components.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px delicate inner stroke (border-white/10) to separate glass from the void background.

sections.name: Hero Section
sections.layout: Centered massive typography + Email capture form + 3D Waveform below
sections.details: Headline 'Real-Time Synthetic Media Defense.' Email input must be glassmorphic with neon green glowing CTA button 'Secure Your Communications'. Add social proof micro-copy below CTA. 3D Waveform uses React Three Fiber spanning the width of the screen, pulsating green/cyan.

sections.name: Product In Action (Multi-Channel)
sections.layout: Interactive Tabbed Interface (Phone, Zoom, Chrome, Email) + CSS-3D transformed mockups
sections.details: Tabs on left/top. Main display area uses Tailwind perspective (perspective-[1000px] rotate-y-[-10deg]) to angle the mockups. Include absolute positioned 'Deepfake Blocked' UI alerts overlaid on the screens with neon green/red glows.

sections.name: Simulated Video Demo Cards
sections.details: 3 premium glassmorphic cards. Each has a video thumbnail, a central glowing play button, and a seek bar at the bottom. Use image URLs provided for the thumbnails.

sections.name: Tech & Compliance Architecture Grid
sections.details: Live dashboard feel. Monospace fonts for numbers (e.g., '120ms Latency', '0.01% False Positives'). Use sharp edges, border-white/10, subtle neon accent lines.

sections.name: Footer
sections.details: Privacy, terms, copyright. Dimmed text, hover to text-white.

component_guidelines.buttons: Primary: bg-[#00FF87] text-[#0B0F19] font-bold rounded-full px-8 py-4 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,255,135,0.6)] transition-all hover:scale-105. Secondary: Glassmorphic with border-white/20 hover:border-[#00F2FE].
component_guidelines.inputs: Email input: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-white placeholder-white/40 focus:border-[#00FF87] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#00FF87] rounded-full px-6 py-4
component_guidelines.cards: Glassmorphism: bg-[#111726]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/5 rounded-2xl relative overflow-hidden

3d_libraries.hero: Use @react-three/fiber and @react-three/drei. Implement a wave/particles component utilizing points or line meshes that animate using useFrame (Math.sin/cos) colored in #00FF87 and #00F2FE.
3d_libraries.mockups: Pure CSS-3D using Tailwind (transform, perspective, rotate-x/y, translate-z). Avoid heavy WebGL for these to keep performance high.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over glassmorphic elements meets 4.5:1 ratio. Text shadow can be used if background becomes too light.
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion for 3D elements and CSS animations.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs) MUST have data-testid attributes.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Tailwind configuration with the custom colors (#0B0F19, #00FF87, #00F2FE).
2. Use lucide-react for standard icons, but prefer custom CSS shapes or raw SVGs for tech-heavy UI mockup overlays.
3. Build the Waitlist Form utilizing standard React state. Integrate it conceptually with the requested MongoDB backend (via a mock API route or standard fetch structure).

4. For the 'Product in Action' tabs, build 4 distinct CSS-3D mockups. E.g., Phone frame with incoming call + overlay alert. Zoom desktop window frame with sidebar. Chrome extension popup. Email client frame.
5. Do NOT use standard Shadcn card styles for marketing sections. Build custom glassmorphic divs using Tailwind.
6. Make sure the Hero waveform using R3F is enclosed in a responsive Canvas element with pointer-events-none if it covers text.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and glassmorphism.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all). Add transitions for specific properties.
You MUST NOT center align the app container in global CSS.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 for icons. Use lucide-react.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Include data-testid on all interactive elements.
DO NOT use completely transparent backgrounds over elements where content scrolls.
